about.seoText1: AIreading is dedicated to making knowledge more accessible through AI technology. We curate classic books in business, psychology, history, biography, science, and other fields, using AI to extract core content into high-quality audio summaries.
about.seoText2: Each book offers short and full audio versions to meet different learning needs. You can listen to these classic books during commutes, workouts, or before bed to efficiently acquire knowledge and improve yourself.

q1.a: AIreading is an AI-powered audiobook platform. We curate quality books worldwide and use AI technology to extract core content into high-quality audio summaries. Each book offers both a short version (about 10 minutes) and a full version (about 60 minutes).

q2.q: Are the audio recordings human or AI-generated?
q2.a: Our audio is generated by AI. We use state-of-the-art text-to-speech technology to ensure clear, natural sound quality that approaches human narration.

q3.q: What's the difference between short and full versions?
q3.a: The short version (about 10 minutes) extracts the book's core viewpoints and key points, suitable for quickly understanding a book's essence. The full version (about 60 minutes) includes more detailed content and case studies, suitable for deep understanding of the book's ideas.

q4.q: How do I choose the right version for me?
q4.a: If you have limited time, you can start with the short version to quickly understand the book's overview. If you're particularly interested in this book, we recommend listening to the full version for deeper understanding. You can also choose different versions at different times based on your learning needs.

q5.a: Currently, AIreading is completely free to use. You can freely listen to both short and full versions of all books.

q6.q: Can I use it on my phone?
q6.a: Yes, AIreading is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and computers. We're also developing a dedicated mobile app—stay tuned.

q7.q: Do you update book content regularly?
q7.a: We continuously update our book library with more quality books. Follow our Twitter @aireading for the latest updates.

q8.a: Currently, audio is only available for online streaming and cannot be downloaded. We plan to add offline listening in the future.

q9.a: For any questions or suggestions, please contact us via email at contact@aireading.com.

q10.a: Our AI system is carefully trained to accurately extract core content from books. We also manually review summary quality for important books to ensure information accuracy.
